Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Naru Saeya]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 11''' — Naru Saeya is the Emperor's little sister.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 11''' — Naru Saeya was the youngest Underlord in the Empire before Eithan.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 4''' — Naru Saeya has wings and wears a fan of peacock feathers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 4''' — Naru Saeya has wings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 7''' — Naru Saeya's wings are the Goldsign of the Path of Grasping Sky.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 7''' — Naru Saeya wears peacock feathers behind her ear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 7''' — Naru Saeya has senses almost as honed as someone from the Arelius family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 7''' — Naru Saeya uses wind aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 7''' — Naru Saeya wields a rainbow sword.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 17''' — Naru Saeya was on the cloudship deck.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — Naru Saeya is the Emperor's sister and uses Grasping Sky madra.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — Saeya is a Naru woman.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — Naru Saeya was sitting in a cycling position.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 7''' — Saeya possesses a locked sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 8''' — Naru Saeya is a concentration of wind madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 8''' — Naru Saeya has emerald wings and peacock feathers behind one ear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 8''' — Naru Saeya has an Iron body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 8''' — Saeya is Naru Saeya.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — Naru Saeya leads the Blackflame Empire team's march.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 13''' — Naru Saeya is part of the Blackflame team.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 13''' — Naru Saeya is a character who uses green wind madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — Saeya holds her sword defensively.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — Naru Saeya is a character who flew low to circle a tower of gold light.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — Naru Saeya has a brother.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — Naru Saeya uses wind aura to float a large trunk.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 10''' — Naru Saeya is part of the group with Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 10''' — Saeya uses flying dreadbeasts as targets for her techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 13''' — Naru Saeya swept an attack away with a gust of wind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 13''' — Naru Saeya uses Ruler techniques to strip logs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — Naru Saeya was fighting an Abyssal Palace priest with a broken rainbow sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — Naru Saeya was fighting in the arena.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 24''' — Naru Saeya is a former team member of Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Naru Saeya is a green blur in the air.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Naru Saeya waited at the bottom of the stairs before flying upwards.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Naru Saeya landed on a corpse and was covered in injuries.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Naru Saeya survived the battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Naru Saeya needs support.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — Naru Saeya suggested the Emperor was pleased with Lindon and Eithan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 5''' — Saeya has been talking about Yerin's battles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Naru Saeya is part of the Naru clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Naru Saeya trained other Underlords from her Empire.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
